docs.text: .image1{ border-radius: 100%; overflow: hidden; width: 135px; } .image2{ width:210px; overflow: hidden; border-radius:20%; } .image3{ width:95px; overflow: hidden; border-radius:5%; } .image4{ width:140px; overflow: hidden; border-radius:5%; } Guanxuan Jiang jgxuann@gmail.com I am an MPhil (Master of Philosophy) student in the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou) with a full scholarship. My research interests are in the fields of Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Virtual Reality (VR) and Augmented Reality (AR), and I am member of Center for M etaverse and C omputational C reativity (MC 2 ) Lab . I obtained my Bachelor of Science with Honour from the University of Sheffield in the department of computer science with one-year study abroad at the Chinese University of Hong Kong . Education September 2023 - June 2025 (expected) - Master of Philosophy (MPhil) The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology , Guangzhou, China Computational Media and Arts Thrust (CMA) , Information Hub Center for M etaverse and C omputational C reativity (MC 2 ) Lab Keywords: Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Virtual Reality (VR) and Augmented Reality (AR) Supervisor: Prof Pan Hui , FRENG , FIEEE , MAE , Distinguished Scientist of ACM September 2020 - June 2023 - Bachelor of Science with Honour (BSc.) The University of Sheffield , Sheffield, England Department of Computer Science , Faculty of Engineering Major: Computer Science Dissertation: ARMessageBoard: Location-Based Social Interaction with Augmented Reality (Distinction) Dissertation Advisors: Prof Nafise Sadat Moosavi and Prof Yue Li September 2021 - June 2022 - Study Abroad The Chinses University of Hong Kong , Shatin, Hong Kong Shaw College , Department of Computer Science and Engineering July 2021 - August 2021 - Summer School Peking University , Beijing, China Working Experience May 2022 - October 2022 - Research Assistant Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University , Suzhou, China Department of Computing, School of Advanced Technology Collaborating Supervisor: Prof Yue Li Keywords: Human Computer Interaction (HCI), Virtual Reality (VR), Augmented Reality (AR) March 2021 - June 2021 - Science and Technology Innovation Division Beijing ANTIY Network Security Technology Co. LTD , Beijing, China Keywords: Attack Capture System, ANTIY(RWD) Fundings June 2022 - Summer Undergraduate Research Fellowships ( SURF ) The Support of the Research Fund from the Department of Computing, School of Advanced Technology, XJTLU June 2021 - Study Abroad with Finance Support 85% Tuition Waiver from the Global Opportunity Organization , The University of Sheffield, £20,000 November 2021 - Turning Scheme Grant from United King Government The Turning Scheme is Held by United Kingdom Government for Abroad (National), £3,000 Awards September 2023 - June 2025(expected) - Full Postgraduate Studentship (PGS) Award from Guangzhou Government The PGS Rate is CNY10,000 Per Month November 2022 - Second Prize in the Final of the 5th China Competition on Virtual Reality The Project Named ‘Virtual Chemistry Laboratory‘, Among 1,000+ Teams, CCVR2022 (National Award) Januray 2021 - Professional Behaviors Team Award in Global Engineering Challenge Projects United Kingdom Standard for Professional Engineering Competence (UKSPEC) , The University of Sheffield June 2020 - International Computer Science Excellence Scholarship Excellent Academic Performance before First-year Entrance, The University of Sheffield, £2,000 Extracurricular Activities July 2023 - 2023 Red Bird Challenge Camp - Nansha, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China May 2022 - 2022 Conference on Human Factors in Computing System - New Orleans, United States Attending Lectures: C12: Inclusion Techniques for Team Practices in HCI & C13: Wearable Technology Design and Accessibility Considerations Course. July 2020 - TENCENT Rhinoceros Bird Elite Research Camp - Shenzhen, Guangdong, China Service & Volunteer June 2021 - June 2022 - Chinese Students and Scholars Association, Sheffield (CSSA-Sheffield) - Sheffield, England Academic Department July 2019 - YIK International Volunteer Service Center - Maldives, Himmafushi Volunteered in Himmafushi, one of the Inhabited Islands of Kaafu Atoll in the Maldive, over 120 hours. Publications Organizing updates...

docs.text: jgxuann@gmail.com I am an MPhil (Master of Philosophy) student in the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou) with a full scholarship. My research interests are in the fields of Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Virtual Reality (VR) and Augmented Reality (AR), and I am member of Center for M etaverse and C omputational C reativity (MC 2 ) Lab . I obtained my Bachelor of Science with Honour from the University of Sheffield in the department of computer science with one-year study abroad at the Chinese University of Hong Kong .
